content: Just as high school language arts curricula use structured reflective writing exercises to help students correct implicit reasoning gaps and build better critical thinking habits, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can borrow the graded vocabulary and structural scaffolding of educational reflection training to systematically improve autonomous agent reflexion performance. This framing reframes LLM self-reflection not as a novel AI trick, but as a pedagogical process that can be tuned using decades of educational design research.
